target: I'm sorry to keep you waiting.

Huh!?! It's really sunny today!!
Why are you carrying an umbrella on a day like this?!
It's 35 degrees today!

(Truly, even if someone said there would be a sudden shower,
it's hard to believe it's going to rain today)
I mean, it's not about anything else. Shinpei.

That day, what happened here…
About the cause of Ushio's death,
there's something I need to tell you.

The Kichikawa Line?
I might have been killed.

Whoa!!
Who the hell are you!?
What the hell are you!?!

…Sou.
There's something I need to tell you about Ushio too.

Ushio!
You can stop disguising yourself now.

Oh no… I'm…
Wait, wait… what the hell…?!

Hey, Shinpei…!!
I guess I should stay hidden…

Don't worry about that anymore!!
I'll explain properly.
No one will call you a monster.

(The shadow, the Nagumo teachers… 
And the loop)
(This time too, Sou listened quietly until the end…)

He's not joking or being silly…
He's a lousy guy, but…
He doesn't lie…
!!!

I'm sorry…
If I had done the resuscitation better…

I know it's too late to apologize…
But at least…

At least… hit me…
Otherwise I won't be able to be your comrade…

(…The first time in the loop, what I saw was
Actually the real event…)

You were trying so hard to save me!!
No one is blaming you, and you don't need to be hit…

(I kicked him!!!
Cleanly kicked his jaw up!!!)

Get up!! Sou!
That should clear your mind!!!

We rely on you!!!
Don't mope around forever!!!

It's Ushio, Shinpei…
This guy really is… ugh… Ushio…
!!!

Ushio, do you remember this place?
This place… this sea is where you…

The private beach behind the elementary school.
That's where I died…

It was given to me by Totsumura.
He said it was entrusted to him by Ushio the day before the accident.
I want to check the contents, but it's locked.

The password.
Wait a second… I think…

She's really… connected to the shadow…
!!!
The Hishigata family… I think there's definitely a connection between you and the shadow…

I also want to find out…
I was planning to sneak into the old infirmary around this time!!!

It's an old building from when the Japanese military made this island a fortress…
Now it's no longer used…

(If it's from that long ago, maybe the records
about the 'mental illness' that Hishigata-sensei mentioned
could still be there!)
There… let's all go with you!!
The phone's lock is off… with fingerprint recognition!
Ah, right! There was also that way to unlock it!

So, how is it?
Did you find anything different?

Huh…?
Don't rely on my memory…

Emails, notes… photos…
Anything at all, check it out!

The 20th at 5:17… the morning before the day I died…
There's one video file…
!!!
